data.title: RED test: Gate 2a integration in fix-bug SKILL.md
data.description:
Create tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2a.py with structural validation tests for Gate 2a in SKILL.md.

Tests:
1. test_gate_2a_section_exists — SKILL.md contains Gate 2a section
2. test_gate_2a_dispatches_script — references gate-2a-reversal-check.sh
3. test_gate_2a_intent_suppression — documents Gate 1a suppression (--intent-aligned flag)
4. test_gate_2a_revert_of_revert — documents revert-of-revert recognition
5. test_gate_2a_post_investigation — Gate 2a appears after investigation/fix proposal, before commit
6. test_gate_2a_primary_signal — references signal_type primary
7. test_gate_2a_failure_fallback — documents graceful degradation (nonzero exit, empty stdout, JSON parse failure -> triggered:false)

Docstring: structural metadata validation — design contract verification.
Append to existing .test-index comma-separated entry for fix-bug/SKILL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2a.py
- [ ] At least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2a.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry updated
  Verify: grep 'fix-bug/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test_fix_bug_gate_2a'
